module_info.docstring:
P1 Regression Tests: Core Message Delivery Flow.

These tests verify the core message delivery functionality including:
1. Basic message sending (send_message)
2. Multiple recipients (to, cc, bcc)
3. Thread creation and continuation
4. Importance levels and ack_required flags
5. Reply message functionality
6. Inbox/outbox synchronization
7. Message read and acknowledgment tracking

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-uvf

functions.name: get_field
functions.docstring: Get a field from either a dict or an object with attributes.

functions.name: get_inbox_items
functions.docstring:
Extract inbox items from a call_tool result as a list of dicts.

FastMCP may return items in different formats, this handles them all.

functions.name: setup_project_with_agents
functions.docstring:
Helper to set up a project with multiple agents (auto-generated names).

Returns a list of agent names in the order they were created.

functions.name: test_send_message_returns_delivery_info
functions.docstring: send_message should return delivery count and deliveries list.

functions.name: test_send_message_self_send
functions.docstring: An agent should be able to send messages to itself.

functions.name: test_send_message_message_id_returned
functions.docstring: send_message should return the message ID in the delivery payload.

functions.name: test_send_message_multiple_to_recipients
functions.docstring: send_message should deliver to multiple recipients in 'to' field.

functions.name: test_send_message_recipient_lookup_query_count
functions.docstring: Sending to many recipients should not scale agent lookup queries linearly.

functions.name: test_list_outbox_recipient_lookup_query_count
functions.docstring: Listing outbox recipients should not fetch recipients per message.

functions.name: test_send_message_with_cc_recipients
functions.docstring: send_message should deliver to CC recipients.

functions.name: test_send_message_with_bcc_recipients
functions.docstring: send_message should deliver to BCC recipients without revealing them.

functions.name: test_send_message_creates_thread_id
functions.docstring: First message with thread_id should create the thread.

functions.name: test_send_message_continues_thread
functions.docstring: Subsequent messages with same thread_id should continue the thread.

functions.name: test_send_message_importance_levels
functions.docstring: send_message should respect importance parameter.

functions.name: test_send_message_ack_required_flag
functions.docstring: send_message should set ack_required flag correctly.

functions.name: test_fetch_inbox_returns_messages
functions.docstring: fetch_inbox should return messages for the agent.

functions.name: test_fetch_inbox_urgent_only_filter
functions.docstring: fetch_inbox with urgent_only should only return high/urgent messages.

functions.name: test_fetch_inbox_include_bodies
functions.docstring: fetch_inbox with include_bodies=True should include message bodies.

functions.name: test_reply_message_creates_thread_link
functions.docstring: reply_message should link to the original message and thread.

functions.name: test_reply_message_prefixes_subject
functions.docstring: reply_message should prefix subject with 'Re:'.

functions.name: test_mark_message_read_workflow
functions.docstring: mark_message_read should mark the message as read for the recipient.

functions.name: test_acknowledge_message_workflow
functions.docstring: acknowledge_message should mark the message as acknowledged.

functions.name: test_read_and_ack_are_idempotent
functions.docstring: Multiple read/ack calls should not change timestamps.

functions.name: test_send_message_nonexistent_recipient_fails
functions.docstring: send_message to a non-existent recipient should fail.

functions.name: test_send_message_nonexistent_sender_fails
functions.docstring: send_message from a non-existent sender should fail.

functions.name: test_reply_to_nonexistent_message_fails
functions.docstring: reply_message to a non-existent message should fail.
